title: High-Value Sitemap Set

calculators.reason: Core site content. Primary traffic and authority pages.

blogs.reason: Top impression driver (149 imp for $20K loan blog). Authority content.

decisions.reason: Financial decision guides. High E-E-A-T potential.

scenarios.reason: Phase 32 hand-crafted content. Future growth engine.

hubs.reason: Data hub, loan payment table, all-pages. Discovery infrastructure.

static_pages.reason: Privacy, terms, about, contact, methodology, etc.

tools_clean.reason: Investment/tax/budget pre-calculated scenarios. Indexable but thin. Consider reducing to top 50 by search demand.
tools_clean.action: Audit for quality, reduce to high-demand scenarios only

guides.reason: 'How to use X' guides. Thin templated content. Most have 0 GSC impressions.
guides.action: Consider noindexing or consolidating into parent calculator pages

tools_gsc_exempted_noindex.reason: In sitemap but pages have noindex meta. Contradiction.

ideal_sitemap_size: 306-656 URLs depending on tool/guide retention decision
note: No execution. This is a plan only.
